daily.today_energy: Mercury's got your back today, Capricorn. You're radiating that quiet confidence that makes people actually listen when you speak. The universe is lowkey rewarding your consistency—lean into it.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, your person might surprise you with something thoughtful. Single? Someone's noticing your vibe from across the room. Either way, authenticity is your biggest flex right now.
daily.career: This is your moment to pitch that idea you've been sitting on. The stars are aligned for recognition, especially if you've been putting in work behind the scenes. Your boss is paying attention.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement today—even a walk hits different when you're this aligned. Hydration matters more than you think. Rest tonight; you've earned it.

weekly.overview: This week invites you to soften your edges, Cap. You've been grinding hard, and the cosmos is asking you to pause and actually feel what you've built. Trust the quiet moments—they're where the real magic happens.
weekly.love: Someone's been paying attention to the small things you do. Whether single or coupled, expect a conversation that feels refreshingly honest. Your vulnerability is your superpower right now, not a weakness.
weekly.career: A project you thought was dead might just get a second wind. The energy shift mid-week could bring an unexpected opportunity or collaboration. Stay flexible and don't dismiss anything immediately—your intuition's sharper than usual.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for rest, not punishment. This isn't the week to push yourself to the limit. Gentle movement, hydration, and actually sleeping count as wins. Stress melts when you stop fighting it.
